description: Stacked nested layers showing dependency depth in a software/trust chain. Each layer insets inward, the deepest layer is highlighted as the infection/compromise point. Use for supply chain attacks, call stacks, trust hierarchies. Supports 2–5 layers.

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Title above the diagram, e.g. 'HOW DEEP THE POISON WENT'
fields.DEPTH_LABEL: Bottom-right badge showing depth, e.g. '4 LAYERS DEEP'
fields.ACCENT_LABEL: Label above depth badge, e.g. 'INFECTION POINT'
fields.LAYER_LABEL_1: Name of layer 1 (outermost / most trusted), e.g. 'YOUR APPLICATION'
fields.LAYER_DESC_1: Description of layer 1, e.g. 'The app your team wrote and shipped'
fields.LAYER_DESC_2: Description of layer 2, e.g. 'Popular HTTP client — 1.5B weekly downloads'
fields.LAYER_DESC_3: Description of layer 3, e.g. 'Transitive dependency — handles HTTP redirects'
fields.LAYER_LABEL_4: Name of layer 4 (deepest / compromised), e.g. 'MALICIOUS SCRIPT'
fields.LAYER_DESC_4: Description of layer 4, e.g. 'postInstall hook stealing environment variables'
fields.LAYER_LABEL_5: Name of layer 5 (leave blank if fewer than 5), e.g. ''
fields.LAYER_DESC_5: Description of layer 5 (leave blank if fewer than 5), e.g. ''
